payload.answer: The new statement conflicts directly with existing memory: 'has two children' vs 'has no children.' Do not overwrite or store either as current without additional evidence, timeframe, or source clarification.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman has two children.
New input: Sam from Goldman has no children.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to Sam associated with Goldman, so they likely target the same person, but the new claim directly contradicts the existing memory.

details: Detected a direct contradiction on the same attribute (number of children).
Applied conservative memory policy: no durable commit of the contradictory update.
Recommended review and disambiguation before any overwrite or supersession.

repair_options: Request a source for the new claim.
Ask whether one statement is outdated and, if so, capture the applicable timeframe.
Verify whether both statements refer to the same Sam from Goldman.
If stronger evidence arrives, mark the older fact as superseded rather than keeping both as current.
